task.title: Hiding archived data sets

titlealts.searchtitle: Hiding and showing archived data sets

task.shortdesc: You can hide archived data sets so that they are not displayed under an MVS Files filter.

keywords.indexterm: hide data sets in offline volumes
show data sets in offline volumes

taskbody.context: Archived data sets include data sets that were migrated or are on offline volumes.

steps-unordered.stepsection: The Remote Systems view normally shows archived data sets.

step.cmd: To see the status of archived files for an MVS Files filter, right-click the filter.
step.stepresult: When the checkbox beside Show Archived Data Sets is selected, archived data sets are displayed under the filter. When it is clear, archived data sets are hidden.

step.cmd: To hide archived data sets under a particular MVS Files filter, right-click the filter name and then click Show Archived Data Sets to clear the checkbox.
step.stepxmp: For example, to hide archived data sets from the My Data Sets filter, right-click My Data Sets and click Show Archived Data Sets.
step.stepresult: This action affects only the selected MVS Files filter. It does not affect other filters, such as Retrieved Data Sets.

step.cmd: To show hidden archived data sets under a particular MVS Files filter, right-click the filter name and then click Show Archived Data Sets to select the checkbox.
